## BaseServer

This class implements basic components of the Server abstraction and is
considered the base class for all type of Servers

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/Ahmed-Khaled-Saleh/fedai/blob/main/fedai/servers/base_server.py#L71"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### BaseServer

``` python

def BaseServer(
    cfg, client_selector, client_cls, criterion, fds, writer:NoneType=None, device:NoneType=None, kwargs:VAR_KEYWORD
):

```

*Initialize self. See help(type(self)) for accurate signature.*

We need to make sure that all clients start from the same initial model
at round 0. So, we need to save the initial model once at the server
side and load it at each client during its initialization.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/Ahmed-Khaled-Saleh/fedai/blob/main/fedai/servers/base_server.py#L98"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>


Each subclass, should implement the `aggregate` method, which is
responsible for aggregating the local models from the clients and
updating the global model/local personalized models accordingly.

href="https://github.com/Ahmed-Khaled-Saleh/fedai/blob/main/fedai/servers/base_server.py#L169"

### Evaluation

All methods are evaluated using the average of the local evaluation
results across all clients.

href="https://github.com/Ahmed-Khaled-Saleh/fedai/blob/main/fedai/servers/base_server.py#L175"
